40.1.2.2 - Management and Evaluation of a Patient Care Plan 
(Rev. 265, Issued: 01-10-20, Effective: 01-01-20, Implementation: 02-11-20) 

Skilled nursing visits for management and evaluation of the patient's care plan are also 
reasonable and necessary where underlying conditions or complications require that only 
a registered nurse can ensure that essential unskilled care is
